evals.name: impact-analysis-schema
evals.prompt: If I change the 'user_id' field type in 'schemas/feedback.py' from UUID to String, what are the cascading impacts on the frontend and database layers?
evals.expected_output: Identification of broken relations in DB and type mismatches in frontend components.

assertions.name: identifies_db_relations
assertions.description: Must mention that ForeignKey constraints in SQLModel objects will be affected.

assertions.name: identifies_frontend_impact
assertions.description: Must suggest checking 'feedback-list.tsx' or similar UI components for type-checking errors.

assertions.name: risk_assessment
assertions.description: Must classify this as a 'High Risk' change due to potential runtime persistence errors.

evals.name: logic-deconstruction-async
evals.prompt: Explain how the memory distillation process in 'memory_service.py' handles concurrent background tasks. Use a Mermaid diagram if possible.
evals.expected_output: A clear explanation of the lock mechanism or queue used, plus a Mermaid sequence diagram.

assertions.name: explains_concurrency
assertions.description: Must identify whether it uses a Semaphore or a Task Queue.

assertions.name: mermaid_rendering
assertions.description: Must provide a valid Mermaid code block showing the task flow.
